star_reflection: Preview Star Reflection button is present.
Preview panel accepts name, DOB and selected/entered location basis.
Output is limited to basis acknowledgement and governance-safe reflection status.
Personalised Star Reflection interpretation remains locked.
panchang: Preview updates the existing Panchang output table instead of a duplicate panel.
Location/date basis can be reflected safely.
Exact Tithi, Nakshatra, Yoga, Paksha and upcoming observance computation remain withheld.
upcoming_observance: Selected basis line can be appended without removing surrounding assets.
Editorial/source verification remains required before public observance output.

location_basis_flow.approved_pilot_place: Selected pilot place resolves to location_id, coordinates, timezone and review status through AG71D-R6.
location_basis_flow.coordinate_entry: User-entered latitude, longitude and timezone form the basis; optional place label remains display-only.

next_gate.purpose: Actual 4-location Panchang computation test and comparison against verified source/method records.
preconditions: Regional method and source freshness must be reviewed.
No full location bank scale-up until 4-location pilot computation passes.
